compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
# Remediate CLAUDE.local.md to machine/operator-local content only

## Why

`CLAUDE.local.md` (155 lines) currently mixes two things: genuinely machine/operator-local
content (this host's hourly `origin/main`-tracking LaunchAgent; the Gerrit credential
identities `RebarBotNava`/`JoeOakhartNava` and keychain specifics) and generally-applicable
project rules that are duplicated from `CLAUDE.md` (worktree discipline, activate-the-venv,
plan-review signing, CI-before-close, the rebar tracking loop, a restatement of the Gerrit
workflow). The generally-applicable rules belong in the shared, checked-in guidance so every
agent gets them; the local file should hold only what is specific to THIS machine/operator.

## What

Strip `CLAUDE.local.md` down to only machine/operator-local content, having first confirmed
(via the AGENTS.md story) that every generally-applicable rule removed now lives in `AGENTS.md`
or `docs/`. Keep: the local main-tracking LaunchAgent note and the Gerrit auth identities /
credential-pinning guidance. Optionally note that Anthropic now deprecates the `CLAUDE.local.md`
name in favor of importing a gitignored file via `@` — record whether we adopt that or keep the
current name (a coherence decision, not required by this story).

## Scope

In: `CLAUDE.local.md` only (git-ignored, local). Out: adding new content to `AGENTS.md`/`docs`
(that is the AGENTS.md and re-home stories — this story only removes what they already re-homed).
Depends on: the AGENTS.md story (the generally-applicable rules must have a home before removal).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `CLAUDE.local.md` contains only machine/operator-local content (main-tracking LaunchAgent
  + Gerrit identities/credential pinning); no duplicated project-workflow guidance remains.
  - Proving: reviewer confirms; `rg -c 'worktree|plan review|Track all work' CLAUDE.local.md`
    trends to 0 for the generally-applicable rules.
- [ ] Every rule removed has a verified home in `AGENTS.md` or `docs/` (no guidance lost).
  - Proving: for each removed rule, cite the `AGENTS.md`/`docs` location in the change description.
- [ ] Decision on the `CLAUDE.local.md`-name-vs-gitignored-`@import` modernization is recorded.
compiled_state.title: Remediate CLAUDE.local.md to machine/operator-local content only
